NSI Bunkerintel : 2026 Market Survey
Best Regards:
MR. DEEPESH MAJIGAMKAR

From:
Nautical Supply International (NSI) Ltd <mike@nauticalsupply.co.uk>
Sent:
17 December 2025 19:05
To:
Deepesh Majigamkar <chartering@varitasnavigation.com>
Subject:
NSI Bunkerintel : 2026 Market Survey
Hi Deepesh
The end of year is in sight, 2025 has been a year of intrigue, volatility and challenges where in previous years we were all much more price and quality sensitive the times have changed and sanctions, origin of molecules, deeper KYC and long term environmental planning have become the order of the day - All of this for an end of year market report i think.
But for now 2026 is looming large. Some things will change, the products we are buying, how they are made, the systems that we use, the companies that we trade with. Some things will stay the same, some of those things for the better, some things for the worse.
But after a lot of you dear readers were eager to express an opinion on the Net Zero Framework vote, here is another one for you.
Paul is busy working away on his Q1 2026 forecast, but i would like to take the opportunity to ask you 13 Questions (I don\'t believe in unlucky numbers)  your professional opinions of the year ahead, again you can remain anonymous if you like or add your email if you are not already receiving our market intel.
2026 Market Questionnaire
Looking forward to all your responses, results will be sent out on the 5th January.
